context_text: Dorothy was thinking so earnestly as they walked along that she did not notice when the Scarecrow stumbled into a hole and rolled over to the side of the road.

context_text: "Why didn't you walk around the hole?" asked the Tin Woodman.

context_text: It was difficult to walk without falling into muddy holes, for the grass was so thick that it hid them from sight.
